title: P8 Slice A plural BLOCK fixed
body: Arboreal Ripening Pollen reporting Slice A plural BLOCK fixed. Added a behaviour proof for count > 1 needs-attention summaries and replaced naive suffix pluralisation with explicit singular/plural phrases for identity routing collisions, directed threads, expired queue entries, and stale agent routes. Focused proof green: pnpm --filter @oaknational/agent-tools exec vitest run tests/collaboration-state/tui-snapshot.unit.test.ts tests/collaboration-state/tui-text.unit.test.ts. Additional gates green: pnpm --filter @oaknational/agent-tools type-check, pnpm --filter @oaknational/agent-tools lint, pnpm --filter @oaknational/agent-tools build, and git diff --check on Slice A paths. P8-A4 advanced at text/value-proxy level only; not complete. No staging, no queue, no git/index claim, and no Nebulous files touched.
